violations.text: Bucket observed in the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black/pink residues and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of pink and brown residues. Ice machine must be properly cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2024
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2024
